name: SC · Logistics — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('North America', 'FastFreight', 'Ground', 8420, 94.2, 3.1, 1240000),
  ('North America', 'FastFreight', 'Air', 2100, 97.8, 1.2, 3800000),
  ('North America', 'QuickShip', 'Ground', 6310, 91.4, 3.8, 890000),
  ('North America', 'QuickShip', 'LTL', 3200, 88.9, 4.2, 640000),
  ('Europe', 'EuroLogix', 'Ground', 5140, 90.1, 4.4, 1120000),
  ('Europe', 'EuroLogix', 'Air', 1820, 96.3, 1.8, 4200000),
  ('Europe', 'TransEU', 'Rail', 4290, 93.7, 5.1, 780000),
  ('Asia Pacific', 'AsiaCargo', 'Ocean', 9800, 82.4, 18.2, 2100000),
  ('Asia Pacific', 'AsiaCargo', 'Air', 2640, 95.6, 2.1, 5900000),
  ('Asia Pacific', 'PacRoute', 'Ocean', 7200, 79.8, 20.1, 1740000),
  ('Latin America', 'LatamEx', 'Ground', 3100, 86.2, 6.3, 520000),
  ('Latin America', 'LatamEx', 'Air', 980, 93.1, 2.4, 1980000)
) AS t(region, carrier, shipment_type, shipments, on_time_pct, avg_transit_days, freight_cost)
